title: Platylotl
body:
# _Platylotl_ replaces the vanilla Minecraft Axolotls with custom made Platypus models and textures.
## Features:

New models and colours for each axolotl variant.

![Showcases the platypus equivalents to minecraft's axolotl variants.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813840eefd93d095148120eafa5df5b4d5220bc3.png)

New Bucket of Axolotl sprite.

![A platypus held in a bucket.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce4609cd2ab57fa821222671e2f628e74a94cb67.png)

New Axolotl Spawn Egg sprite.

![Platypus Spawn Egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a23ccc2f58a179507860164c7ea9beb95932269.png)

All instances of "Axolotl" are renamed to "Platypus"

## Dependencies:

This pack requires Traben's [[ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [[EMF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) client side mods to work. Please make sure they are installed before installing this pack.

![ETF mod icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Traben-0/Entity_Texture_Features/master/.github/README-assets/icon.png)
![EMF mod icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Traben-0/Entity_Model_Features/master/fabric/src/main/resources/icon.png)
